slides.headline: Create Songs That Sound Like You
slides.subtext: Turn your special moments into personalized songs with AI-powered music generation

slides.headline: Tell Us Your Story
slides.subtext: Share who the song is for, the occasion, and your favorite memories. Our AI crafts lyrics just for them.

slides.headline: Your Voice, Your Way
slides.subtext: Use AI vocals or optionally add your own voice to make songs even more personal
